mechanism_narrative: Declining federal funds rate over a 3-month window signals monetary easing that reduces equity discount rates and increases present value of future corporate cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the subsequent 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS at 5.33% as of 2024-08-01 suggests potential easing cycle ahead
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC < 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or mean 20-day forward returns during easing periods not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Unemployment rate rising more than 0.3 percentage points over a 3-month period signals labor market deterioration and recession risk, triggering equity risk-off positioning and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
regime_hint: late-cycle expansion with labor market softening
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in > 65% of triggered instances despite unemployment deterioration signal, or Rank IC < 0.02 over any 1-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Retail sales growth acceleration combined with housing starts expansion signals robust consumer demand and construction activity, indicating economic strength that supports positive equity valuations and S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS at 709,668M and HOUST at 1,238K units as of 2024-07-01
regime_hint: sustained economic expansion with healthy consumer spending
failure_condition: Rank IC of interaction term < 0.04 over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns during joint acceleration periods not significantly higher than single-series baseline (F-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production index declining below its 3-month moving average signals supply-side weakness and potential stagflation risk, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days as profit margins compress.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite supply weakness, or Rank IC < 0.025 over any 18-month rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll employment growth decelerating below 100K per month combined with rising unemployment signals labor market inflection point that reduces consumer confidence and spending, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:PAYEMS at 158,779K and UNRATE at 4.2% as of 2024-08-01
failure_condition: Rank IC of interaction term < 0.035 over any 2-year rolling window, or mean 20-day returns during joint deterioration periods not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Inflation measured by CPI remaining elevated above 3.5% year-over-year while federal funds rate exceeds 5% signals restrictive monetary policy stance that constrains economic growth and equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:CPIAUCSL at 314.12 and FEDFUNDS at 5.33% as of 2024-08-01
regime_hint: monetary tightening cycle with persistent inflation
failure_condition: Rank IC of interaction term < 0.04 over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns during joint restrictive periods not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Real GDP growth acceleration above 2.5% annualized signals robust economic expansion that supports corporate earnings growth and equity valuations, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
regime_hint: any regime with positive GDP growth
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC < 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns during high-growth quarters not significantly higher than low-growth quarters (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts declining more than 15% month-over-month signals sharp contraction in construction activity and forward-looking demand weakness, triggering negative equity sentiment and S&P 500 forward returns over 5 trading days.
regime_hint: demand shock or policy-induced housing contraction
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in > 70% of triggered instances despite sharp housing decline, or Rank IC < 0.02 over any 1-year rolling window.
